NOTE FOR TESTERS
================

This file is a placeholder. The size-threshold DLP test requires a file > 10 MB.

To generate the actual test file, run this PowerShell command from the fixtures directory:

    $content = "A" * 1MB
    $bigContent = $content * 11
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$PWD\large_file_test.txt", $bigContent)

This creates an ~11 MB .txt file. Upload it on any website with a file input while the
extension is active to trigger the size-threshold block (Tier 0).

The file content is intentionally benign (repeated 'A' characters) to isolate the
size check from regex or semantic detection.
